mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pet_health_record (pet_name, pet_type, pet_gender, pet_age, weight, vaccine_record, health_status, create_time, user_id) VALUES (#{petName}, #{petType},#{petGender}, #{petAge}, #{weight}, #{vaccineRecord}, #{healthStatus}, NOW(), #{userId})
mapper.update: UPDATE pet_health_record SET pet_name = #{petName}, pet_type = #{petType}, pet_gender = #{petGender}, pet_age = #{petAge}, weight = #{weight}, vaccine_record = #{vaccineRecord}, health_status = #{healthStatus} WHERE id = #{id}
